title: Emmys Armor and Tools
description:
A tools and armor mod that adds emerald and obsidian variants.

Also, the mod name is specifically NOT named "Emmy's Armor and Tools."
body:
![Emmys Main Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e828178d209f8e8d2ef0196e7a1f629bcf3dddea.png)

#

A simple mod that adds emerald and obsidian armor and tools.

![armor showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d2bdb3565f4e1d687cf300b7cc60402af0fea19.png)

#

![Features Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb640982dcb95a7a17343a22032b2a26d98448a8.png)

New Armor and Tools are meant to be felt like they have magical properties so they have a higher enchantability. Emerald is bulkier, while Obsidian is meant to be more of a glass cannon.

All armor is fully trimmable and can be any color or style of trim.

(All stats and values of the new equipment are viable to future balance changes).

#

![Info Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15aac36863b5580f59a1ba47a078fa4ff66bb86f.png)

Found a bug? Report it [here](https://github.com/Elijah-Guzman/emmy/issues). If you want the mod to be translated into another language, report it as a bug, and I will do my best.

Suggested Partner Mods:  
If you struggle to remember the new item recipes, a mod like [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) might be useful!

If you need the recipies for the new items, you can check them out in the gallery or the in game crafting guide (that little green book no one remembers) and/or a mod like JEI.
